title: cestichis cumingii
intro: Cestichis cumingii, also known as the "Squirrel Flower," is a flowering plant species native to the Philippines. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Cestichis cumingii include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, often mixed with other herbs, to create remedies for various health conditions.
